meta.reproduce_command: PYTHONPATH=. ./venv/bin/python examples/claim_stability_demo.py --task maxcut --suite large --space-preset sampling_only --claim-pairs 'QAOA_p2>QAOA_p1' --deltas 0.0,0.01,0.05 --sampling-mode adaptive_ci --target-ci-width 0.03 --max-sample-size 128 --min-sample-size 16 --step-size 8 --sample-seed 42 --backend-engine basic --out-dir output/presentation_large/adaptive/maxcut_sampling_p2_vs_p1_w03

claim.delta_interpretation: delta is a practical significance threshold; increasing delta makes the claim stricter and may change both holds rate and stability.

stability_rule.decision: stable iff CI lower bound >= threshold

decision_example.rule: selected baseline winner remains in top-2 under perturbation
